reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion.
Pagas lo que cargas.
Pocas veces tuve que esperar y no mas de unos minutos.
Los sistemas funcionan siempre y siempre tenes un descuento de YPF Serviclub o de tu banco.
Tiene servicentro.
Saludos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service.
You pay for what you charge.
I rarely had to wait, and it was never more than a few minutes.
The systems always work, and you always get a discount from YPF Serviclub or your bank.
It has a service center.
Best regards.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5N0kzNzN3RRAB
